description: Chat Web entry points, session annotation UI, composer attachment state, outgoing message metadata, and model-visible annotation context.

userStories.title: Add Chat Web annotation entry points
userStories.description: As a Chat Web user, I want to start URL annotation or attach an existing browser target from the active session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add UI action to annotate a URL from the current Pibo Session and Room
Add UI action to list and select an existing CDP target with bounded title and URL
Entry points are disabled or hidden when no active session context exists
Concise errors are shown for CDP unavailable, target not found, and injection failure
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by Chat Web Web Annotations header entry point with URL annotation, optional CDP URL, target refresh/list, explicit attach actions, disabled active-session gating, concise error status, and DOM-ready injection guard for newly opened targets. Docker worker typecheck, build, focused web-annotation tests, and browser verification passed.

userStories.title: Add current-session annotation list or chips
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see annotations for my active session so that I can choose what feedback to send.
acceptanceCriteria: Add current-session annotations panel, drawer, or composer-adjacent chip strip
UI shows empty, loading, error, and populated states
Each annotation row/chip shows status, target kind/label, short note, URL host/path, and creation time
Resolved/dismissed visibility follows the PRD default or includes a clear filter if shown
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement composer attach detach state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to attach and detach one or more annotations before sending a message.
acceptanceCriteria: Composer stores selected annotation ids separately from text input
Attach/detach controls update selection without mutating the annotation record until send
Selection clears after successful send or explicit composer clear
Stale or unauthorized selected ids are revalidated before send
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist outgoing annotation attachments
userStories.description: As an agent, I want sent messages to carry annotation references so that structured feedback survives replay and inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend outgoing message payload or metadata to include annotation attachment references or normalized copies
Persist sent attachment data in the Chat Web event/log/read-model path used for replay
Update annotation status to attached or equivalent after successful send
Original annotation remains inspectable through store/tools after send
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Render bounded model-visible annotation context
userStories.description: As an agent, I want attached annotations rendered into a concise structured block so that I know exactly what the user means.
acceptanceCriteria: Render a bounded <attached-web-annotations> block or equivalent into model-visible message content
Block includes annotation id, target kind, URL, label, selector or fallback, source hint summary, position, short text, and note when available
Block omits inline screenshot data and truncates/escapes HTML hints and long text
Prompt rendering tests cover multiple annotations, truncation, and missing source hints
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Validate Chat Web annotation attachment flow
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want browser checks for the full Chat Web flow so that users can create, attach, send, and review annotations.
acceptanceCriteria: Browser check covers empty state and annotation list refresh
Browser check covers URL annotation action and existing-target attach action where CDP is available
Browser check covers attach/detach chip behavior and successful send
Browser check verifies model-visible trace or outgoing payload contains bounded annotation context
Browser verification passes
Typecheck passes
